caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed in gold letters across the chest is seated in a studio. He wears a gold chain around his neck and is positioned in profile, facing toward a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo consisting of five gold stars and the words "UNION HUSTLE." To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black object with the text "TALK" is visible on the table, alongside a black container featuring a logo that says "BOSS TALK ON BOSS". Throughout the sequence, the man remains still in his seated position, maintaining a neutral expression while looking forward, with no significant movement or change in the environment.
